summary.en: AI agents that help you understand your customers' needs.
summary.zh: 幫助你了解顧客需求的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: An AI-powered user researcher whose agentic workflows recruit participants, run interviews, and analyze responses to uncover the why behind every decision.
highlight.zh: 一個由 AI 驅動的使用者研究員,透過代理式工作流程招募受訪者、進行訪談並分析回應,挖掘每個決策背後的原因。

summary.en: A full-stack AI store manager for physical retail stores.
summary.zh: 為實體零售店打造的全端 AI 店長。

highlight.en: Drawing on 100 years of family grocery experience, Kirana uses an on-premise GPU to monitor stores 24/7 for theft and safety, with planned ordering and pricing automation.
highlight.zh: 借助百年家族雜貨店經驗,Kirana 以本地端 GPU 全天候監控店內竊盜與安全,並規劃自動化訂貨與定價等日常營運。

summary.en: An AI-native Zocdoc that lets doctors answer patient calls 24/7 with voice agents.
summary.zh: AI 原生版 Zocdoc,讓醫師以語音代理全天候接聽病患來電。

highlight.en: Trapeze's voice agents clone a practice's best receptionists, and in three months onboarded 140+ doctors nationwide serving over a million patients.
highlight.zh: Trapeze 的語音代理複製診所最優秀的接待人員,三個月內已導入全美 140 多位醫師,服務超過一百萬名病患。

summary.en: An iPad app that understands handwritten math, like Grammarly for algebra.
summary.zh: 看得懂手寫數學的 iPad 應用程式,如同代數版的 Grammarly。

highlight.en: Built by two Oxford math grads who tutored for a decade, Chiron reads math as it's written to enable fully 1-on-1, personalized learning.
highlight.zh: 由兩位牛津數學系畢業、有十年家教經驗的創辦人打造,Chiron 能即時讀懂手寫數學,實現完全一對一的個人化學習。

summary.en: A universal voice operating system: say it and it's done.
summary.zh: 通用語音作業系統:說出口,就完成。

highlight.en: VoiceOS works across any app, letting users speak naturally to dictate, edit, and write text instantly, bridging the gap between thought and expression.
highlight.zh: VoiceOS 可在任何應用程式中運作,讓使用者用自然口語即時口述、編輯與撰寫文字,弭平想法與表達之間的落差。

summary.en: The data layer for scientific research.
summary.zh: 科學研究的資料層。

highlight.en: Labric captures messy lab data from instruments and tools, then cleans and connects it so researchers can actually use AI to accelerate discovery.
highlight.zh: Labric 從儀器與工具擷取雜亂的實驗室數據,加以清理並串接,讓研究人員能真正運用 AI 加速發現。

summary.en: AI that automates field inspection report writing for construction.
summary.zh: 為營建業自動化現場勘查報告撰寫的 AI。

highlight.en: Inspectors walk a site speaking observations and snapping photos while Opusense generates organized reports on-site in real time, cutting reporting time fivefold.
highlight.zh: 勘查員巡視現場時口述觀察並拍照,Opusense 即時生成條理分明的報告,將報告時間縮短為原本的五分之一。

summary.en: Reinforcement learning as a service for LLMs and AI agents.
summary.zh: 為 LLM 與 AI 代理提供的強化學習服務。

highlight.en: Give RunRL a model, a prompt, and a reward, and it uses reinforcement learning to make the model's reward go up, replacing endless prompt tweaking.
highlight.zh: 只要提供 RunRL 一個模型、提示詞與獎勵函數,它便以強化學習提升模型的獎勵分數,取代無止盡的提示詞調整。

summary.en: Open-source multimodal search for AI apps.
summary.zh: 為 AI 應用打造的開源多模態搜尋。

highlight.en: Morphik's multimodal search serves customers ranging from space-tech teams searching research papers to developers building brokerage agents.
highlight.zh: Morphik 的多模態搜尋服務涵蓋從搜尋研究論文的太空科技團隊,到打造券商代理的開發者等各類客戶。

summary.en: An AI-native operating system for vehicle fleet management.
summary.zh: 車隊管理的 AI 原生作業系統。

highlight.en: Flott unifies planning, live GPS and fuel tracking, invoicing, and payments in one AI-powered control center, with agents that automate fleet managers' repetitive tasks.
highlight.zh: Flott 將排程、即時 GPS 與油耗追蹤、開票與付款整合於單一 AI 控制中心,並以代理自動處理車隊經理的重複性工作。

summary.en: An agentic system of action for hotel groups and management companies.
summary.zh: 為飯店集團與管理公司打造的代理式行動系統。

highlight.en: Anana unites hospitality revenue, sales, and operations teams in one place, taking action directly in existing tools to drive occupancy, guest satisfaction, and revenue.
highlight.zh: Anana 將飯店營收、業務與營運團隊整合於同一平台,直接在既有工具中執行動作,以提升住房率、賓客滿意度與營收。

summary.en: A smarter way to estimate steel for construction.
summary.zh: 更聰明的營建鋼材估算方式。

highlight.en: Alkali is building the next generation of estimation tools for construction, starting with steel.
highlight.zh: Alkali 正打造下一代營建估算工具,並從鋼材估算切入。

summary.en: Building reinforcement learning environments for training frontier models.
summary.zh: 打造用於訓練前沿模型的強化學習環境。

highlight.en: Cartpole creates the reinforcement learning environments used to train frontier AI models.
highlight.zh: Cartpole 建立用於訓練前沿 AI 模型的強化學習環境。

summary.en: Efficient, compact power supplies for AI hardware and emerging tech.
summary.zh: 為 AI 硬體與新興科技打造的高效精巧電源供應器。

highlight.en: Using patented circuit topology, embedded packaging, and novel magnetics, PowerMatrix cuts energy loss by up to 50% and is collaborating with world-leading customers.
highlight.zh: PowerMatrix 運用專利電路拓樸、嵌入式封裝與新型磁性元件,將能量損耗降低達 50%,並與世界級客戶合作。

summary.en: Cursor for lawyers: agentic AI inside Microsoft Office.
summary.zh: 律師版的 Cursor:嵌入 Microsoft Office 的代理式 AI。

highlight.en: Vesence brings code-editor-style tooling to contract drafting and review in Word, and has already rolled out firm-wide at a first major law firm since its February launch.
highlight.zh: Vesence 將程式編輯器般的工具帶入 Word 的合約起草與審閱,自二月推出以來已在首家大型律師事務所全所導入。

summary.en: Robots for the inspection and maintenance of data centers.
summary.zh: 用於資料中心檢查與維護的機器人。

highlight.en: Boost's autonomous mobile manipulation robots increase inspection frequency and speed triage, saving data centers millions in insurance premiums and SLA violations.
highlight.zh: Boost 的自主移動操作機器人提高檢查頻率並加速問題分流,為資料中心節省數百萬美元的保險費與 SLA 違約損失。

summary.en: An open-source CLI that turns website workflows into reliable, reusable APIs.
summary.zh: 將網站工作流程轉為可靠、可重用 API 的開源 CLI。

highlight.en: Instead of running fragile real-time agents, Libretto has coding agents generate workflows as readable code during development, combining Playwright with direct network calls.
highlight.zh: Libretto 不靠脆弱的即時代理,而是讓編碼代理在開發階段把工作流程生成為可讀的程式碼,並結合 Playwright 與直接網路呼叫。

summary.en: Life sciences instrument and reagent manufacturing built for AI.
summary.zh: 為 AI 打造的生命科學儀器與試劑製造。

highlight.en: Bramante manufactures instruments and reagents purpose-built for AI, automated labs, and personalized medicines.
highlight.zh: Bramante 製造專為 AI、自動化實驗室與個人化醫療打造的儀器與試劑。

summary.en: ValueMate automates real estate appraisals with AI.
summary.zh: ValueMate 以 AI 自動化房地產估價。

highlight.en: ValueMate's LiDAR-plus-AI app captures a property in a three-minute walkthrough and delivers a regulator-ready report, slashing valuation cycle times by 80%.
highlight.zh: ValueMate 結合 LiDAR 與 AI 的應用程式,以三分鐘巡視即可擷取房產資料並產出符合法規的報告,將估價週期縮短 80%。

summary.en: Specialized AI for critical industries.
summary.zh: 為關鍵產業打造的專用 AI。

highlight.en: Kairos closes the last-mile reliability gap in AI deployments by deploying specialized agents that encode operator expertise to automate the most manual workflows.
highlight.zh: Kairos 透過部署封裝操作員專業知識的專用代理,自動化最仰賴人力的工作流程,彌補 AI 部署最後一哩的可靠性落差。

summary.en: Hands-off QA via intelligent browser agents.
summary.zh: 以智慧瀏覽器代理實現免動手的品質保證。

highlight.en: Propolis simulates real users via swarms of autonomous browser agents that run your testing for you.
highlight.zh: Propolis 透過成群的自主瀏覽器代理模擬真實使用者,自動為你執行測試。

summary.en: Turning real life into a video game.
summary.zh: 把真實人生變成一款電玩遊戲。

highlight.en: Den aims to make real life feel like a video game.
highlight.zh: Den 的目標是讓真實人生感覺如同一款電玩遊戲。

summary.en: Open-source experiment tracking for training ML models.
summary.zh: 用於訓練機器學習模型的開源實驗追蹤工具。

highlight.en: mlop is a fully open-source, performant, and actionable platform for tracking ML model training.
highlight.zh: mlop 是一個完全開源、高效能且具可操作性的機器學習模型訓練追蹤平台。

summary.en: An all-in-one AI growth partner built for the trades.
summary.zh: 為技術工種打造的一站式 AI 成長夥伴。

highlight.en: Cactus answers every inbound HVAC, plumbing, and roofing call within 60 seconds and books it into tools like ServiceTitan, while reactivating warm and dormant leads outbound.
highlight.zh: Cactus 在 60 秒內接聽每通空調、水電與屋頂業者的來電並排入 ServiceTitan 等工具,同時主動重新接觸潛在與沉睡客戶。

summary.en: Self-driving CI: an AI-native DevOps platform for teams that ship.
summary.zh: 自駕式 CI:為持續交付團隊打造的 AI 原生 DevOps 平台。

highlight.en: StarSling Runners are fast GitHub Actions runners with AI agents that continuously improve build speeds by more than 80%.
highlight.zh: StarSling Runners 是搭載 AI 代理的高速 GitHub Actions 執行器,可持續將建置速度提升超過 80%。

summary.en: AI plus human review for data cleaning, accessible via API or Excel.
summary.zh: 結合 AI 與人工審核的資料清理服務,可透過 API 或 Excel 使用。

highlight.en: sieve replaces hedge funds' email-based human review steps with an API that returns clean, validated financial data in four lines of code, backed by expert-in-the-loop review.
highlight.zh: sieve 以一個 API 取代避險基金以電子郵件進行的人工審核步驟,只需四行程式碼即可取得乾淨、經驗證的金融資料,並由專家把關。

summary.en: An AI-native consumer and plaintiff law firm.
summary.zh: AI 原生的消費者與原告方律師事務所。

highlight.en: Blueshoe is a full-stack law firm where people access guidance via web app or AI interfaces, and attorneys handle cases to resolution with AI-native tools and data.
highlight.zh: Blueshoe 是一家全端律師事務所,民眾可透過網頁應用或 AI 介面取得法律指引,律師則運用 AI 原生工具與數據將案件處理至結案。

summary.en: Real-world data for multimodal and embodied AI.
summary.zh: 為多模態與具身 AI 提供的真實世界資料。

highlight.en: Sureform collects high-quality human data across diverse interactions and environments to advance the next generation of multimodal AI and robotics models.
highlight.zh: Sureform 在多樣的互動與環境中蒐集高品質的人類資料,以推進下一代多模態 AI 與機器人模型。

summary.en: AI agents for web testing in plain English.
summary.zh: 以白話英文進行網頁測試的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Docket lets you write end-to-end tests in plain English and keeps them up to date automatically, powered by real user sessions.
highlight.zh: Docket 讓你用白話英文撰寫端對端測試,並依據真實使用者工作階段自動保持測試更新。

summary.en: The agentic CRM for blue-collar service businesses.
summary.zh: 為藍領服務業打造的代理式 CRM。

highlight.en: Cohesive fully automates sales and marketing outreach to local businesses and property owners for trades like janitorial, landscaping, and pest control.
highlight.zh: Cohesive 為清潔、景觀與除蟲等技術服務業全面自動化對在地企業與屋主的業務與行銷接觸。

summary.en: Agentic AI security and governance.
summary.zh: 代理式 AI 的安全與治理。

highlight.en: Golf gives enterprises visibility into shadow AI and control over AI agents and MCP, letting them see what's connected, enforce policies, and generate audit trails in one place.
highlight.zh: Golf 讓企業看清影子 AI,並掌控 AI 代理與 MCP,在單一平台檢視已連接項目、執行政策並產生稽核軌跡。

summary.en: AI consumer social.
summary.zh: AI 消費者社交。

highlight.en: neoncoral is building an AI-driven consumer social product.
highlight.zh: neoncoral 正打造一款 AI 驅動的消費者社交產品。

summary.en: The infrastructure that robot intelligence is built and deployed on.
summary.zh: 用以建構與部署機器人智慧的基礎設施。

highlight.en: The Robot Learning Company provides the infrastructure on which robot intelligence is built and deployed.
highlight.zh: The Robot Learning Company 提供建構與部署機器人智慧所需的基礎設施。

summary.en: Open-source, agentic knowledge bases for all of humanity's knowledge.
summary.zh: 涵蓋全人類知識的開源代理式知識庫。

highlight.en: Alpha Research extends search and RAG with coding agents that use tools like ripgrep to find evidence; its first open-sourced platform runs on 75,000 Project Gutenberg books.
highlight.zh: Alpha Research 以使用 ripgrep 等工具尋找證據的編碼代理擴充搜尋與 RAG,其首個開源平台建立在 75,000 本古騰堡計畫書籍之上。

summary.en: The school for a post-AGI world.
summary.zh: 為後 AGI 時代打造的學校。

highlight.en: Units lets ambitious students earn accredited diploma credits in 4 months instead of 4 years, graduating with a portfolio of real-world work rather than just a transcript.
highlight.zh: Units 讓有志的學生在 4 個月內取得認證文憑學分(而非 4 年),畢業時擁有真實作品集而不只是成績單。

summary.en: An AI-powered math tutor following the K-12 curriculum.
summary.zh: 依循 K-12 課綱的 AI 數學家教。

highlight.en: Tegore designs Algebra courses around K-12 lesson plans and delivers them with voice, interactive visuals, and dialectic teaching, like a Duolingo for math.
highlight.zh: Tegore 依 K-12 教案設計代數課程,以語音、互動視覺與對話式教學呈現,如同數學版的 Duolingo。

summary.en: Managed GPU-accelerated Spark and SQL at 2x speed and half the cost.
summary.zh: 代管的 GPU 加速 Spark 與 SQL,速度加倍、成本減半。

highlight.en: ParaQuery is a fully managed, Spark-compatible, cloud-agnostic solution that runs large SQL and Spark workloads serverlessly without data migrations or vendor lock-in.
highlight.zh: ParaQuery 是完全代管、相容 Spark 且不綁雲端的方案,可無伺服器地執行大型 SQL 與 Spark 工作負載,無需資料遷移或廠商鎖定。

summary.en: AI-powered code security that detects exposed credentials.
summary.zh: 偵測外洩憑證的 AI 程式碼安全工具。

highlight.en: BitPatrol uses AI to detect exposed credentials in real time, protecting organizations from high-impact data breaches.
highlight.zh: BitPatrol 運用 AI 即時偵測外洩的憑證,保護組織免於影響重大的資料外洩。

summary.en: Design a chip in minutes.
summary.zh: 幾分鐘內完成晶片設計。

highlight.en: Partcl modernizes chip design automation with GPU-accelerated, physics-informed models that run up to 700x faster than legacy tools, cutting weeks off development.
highlight.zh: Partcl 以 GPU 加速、融入物理的模型革新晶片設計自動化,速度較傳統工具快達 700 倍,省下數週的開發時間。

summary.en: Conversational robots for physical businesses.
summary.zh: 為實體商家打造的對話式機器人。

highlight.en: HABIT's robots greet tens of thousands of Americans monthly with a smile, answering questions, upselling customers, and trainable just like a human employee.
highlight.zh: HABIT 的機器人每月微笑迎接數萬名美國民眾,回答問題、向顧客加售,並能如人類員工般受訓。

summary.en: Quantum-accelerated AI servers.
summary.zh: 量子加速的 AI 伺服器。

highlight.en: Sygaldry builds quantum-accelerated AI servers to exponentially speed up training and inference, plus tools for researchers to integrate quantum capabilities into AI models.
highlight.zh: Sygaldry 打造量子加速的 AI 伺服器,以指數方式加速訓練與推論,並提供讓研究人員將量子能力整合進 AI 模型的工具。

summary.en: Wholesale fresh-produce distribution at the speed of compute.
summary.zh: 以運算速度運作的生鮮蔬果批發配送。

highlight.en: GETASAP rebuilds produce distribution around real demand, using micro-fulfillment centers and live retail data for 8-hour same-day delivery with far less safety stock.
highlight.zh: GETASAP 圍繞真實需求重建蔬果配送,運用微型履約中心與即時零售數據,以遠低的安全庫存實現 8 小時當日送達。

summary.en: AI assistants that bring customers to car dealerships.
summary.zh: 為汽車經銷商招攬客戶的 AI 助理。

highlight.en: Since 56% of dealership leads arrive after hours, Flai's AI assistants answer calls 24/7 to schedule test drives, oil changes, and run outbound recall campaigns.
highlight.zh: 由於 56% 的經銷商商機在下班後湧入,Flai 的 AI 助理全天候接聽來電,安排試駕、換油並執行外撥召回行銷。

summary.en: An AI-powered metals supplier for America's industrial base.
summary.zh: 為美國工業基礎供料的 AI 驅動金屬供應商。

highlight.en: Nox Metals builds automated factories that turn raw metal into production-ready material faster, cheaper, and more reliably than legacy service centers.
highlight.zh: Nox Metals 打造自動化工廠,將原始金屬轉為可直接投產的材料,比傳統加工中心更快、更便宜且更可靠。

summary.en: Mass-producible long-range drone submarines.
summary.zh: 可量產的長程無人潛艇。

highlight.en: In the era of autonomous warfare, Albacore builds long-range drone submarines that can traverse oceans and be deployed at scale to support military operators.
highlight.zh: 在自主作戰的時代,Albacore 打造可橫越大洋、能大規模部署的長程無人潛艇,以支援軍事操作人員。

summary.en: Automates insurance claims and stops incorrect payouts.
summary.zh: 自動化保險理賠並阻止錯誤給付。

highlight.en: Solva is a domain-specific AI for claims that gives leading insurers clarity and speed on their most complex cases.
highlight.zh: Solva 是專為理賠打造的領域專用 AI,讓頂尖保險業者在最複雜的案件上獲得清晰判斷與處理速度。

summary.en: The AI platform for private markets investors.
summary.zh: 為私募市場投資人打造的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: F2 turns unstructured deal data into investment-grade analysis and memos in minutes for private credit, equity, and banking teams, helping them evaluate deals over 60% faster.
highlight.zh: F2 在幾分鐘內將非結構化交易資料轉為投資級分析與備忘錄,服務私募信貸、私募股權與商業銀行團隊,讓他們評估交易快上逾 60%。

summary.en: AI that maps every law, regulation, and court case.
summary.zh: 繪製每一條法律、法規與判例的 AI。

highlight.en: Vulcan's "intelligent legal cartography" lets agencies and businesses replace consulting projects with instant analyses; in 3 months it secured Virginia's Executive Order 51.
highlight.zh: Vulcan 的「智慧法律製圖」讓機關與企業以即時分析取代顧問專案,三個月內便促成維吉尼亞州第 51 號行政命令。

summary.en: Voice AI for enterprises.
summary.zh: 為企業打造的語音 AI。

highlight.en: Freya builds voice AI for enterprise use cases.
highlight.zh: Freya 為企業應用情境打造語音 AI。

summary.en: Reinforcement learning environments that teach AI to code expertly.
summary.zh: 教 AI 達到專家級程式能力的強化學習環境。

highlight.en: Idler builds reinforcement learning environments based on real-world coding scenarios, preparing models for the complex challenges they'll face in production.
highlight.zh: Idler 依真實程式情境建構強化學習環境,讓模型為生產環境中將面對的複雜挑戰做好準備。

summary.en: Infrastructure to build reliable AI agents.
summary.zh: 用以打造可靠 AI 代理的基礎設施。

highlight.en: Metis builds infrastructure that enables AI agents to reliably perform complex tasks in production.
highlight.zh: Metis 打造能讓 AI 代理在生產環境中可靠執行複雜任務的基礎設施。

summary.en: Optimizing fleet planning with data-driven algorithms.
summary.zh: 以數據驅動演算法優化車隊規劃。

highlight.en: Fleetline combines advanced optimization with LLMs to build a complete-context load planner that adapts to each fleet's needs and captures driver-specific preferences.
highlight.zh: Fleetline 結合進階最佳化與 LLM,打造具完整脈絡的配載規劃器,可因應各車隊需求並掌握個別司機的偏好。

summary.en: Compute substrate for AI agents.
summary.zh: 為 AI 代理打造的運算基底。

highlight.en: Dedalus offers the fastest persistent computer for agents, hosting long-running, stateful agents that never sleep in under 250ms.
highlight.zh: Dedalus 提供最快的代理持久運算環境,以低於 250 毫秒的速度承載永不休眠、長時間執行的有狀態代理。

summary.en: Email inboxes for AI agents.
summary.zh: 為 AI 代理打造的電子郵件收件匣。

highlight.en: AgentMail is an email inbox API that gives AI agents their own inboxes, just as Gmail does for humans.
highlight.zh: AgentMail 是一個電子郵件收件匣 API,如同 Gmail 之於人類,讓 AI 代理擁有自己的收件匣。

summary.en: Automating creator marketing for the world's largest brands.
summary.zh: 為全球頂尖品牌自動化創作者行銷。

highlight.en: Reacher automates creator marketing from discovery and outreach to campaign management, centralizing TikTok Shop, Instagram, and YouTube creators in one platform.
highlight.zh: Reacher 自動化從發掘、接洽到活動管理的創作者行銷流程,將 TikTok Shop、Instagram 與 YouTube 創作者集中於單一平台。

summary.en: An AI tax preparer for CPA firms.
summary.zh: 為會計師事務所打造的 AI 報稅助手。

highlight.en: Magnetic scans client documents from handwritten notes to multi-state K-1s and enters them into tax software automatically, easing a profession facing a talent shortage.
highlight.zh: Magnetic 掃描從手寫紀錄到跨州 K-1 等客戶文件,並自動鍵入報稅軟體,緩解面臨人才短缺的會計業壓力。

summary.en: Reshoring critical metal production to the U.S.
summary.zh: 將關鍵金屬生產回流至美國。

highlight.en: Duranium's novel reactor recycles CO2 emissions back into carbon feedstock while producing a valuable byproduct, enabling carbon-neutral titanium and magnesium at Chinese-level pricing.
highlight.zh: Duranium 的新型反應爐將二氧化碳排放回收為碳原料,並產出有價值的副產品,以中國級價格實現碳中和的鈦與鎂生產。

summary.en: AI agents for the consumer lending industry.
summary.zh: 為消費信貸產業打造的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Veritus is an omni-channel platform whose AI voice agents negotiate repayment plans and drive recoveries with zero human involvement, cutting cost-to-collect.
highlight.zh: Veritus 是全通路平台,其 AI 語音代理在零人力介入下協商還款方案並推動回收,降低催收成本。

summary.en: AI agents that automate administrative work across college campuses.
summary.zh: 自動化大學校園行政工作的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Risely's agents integrate into university SIS, LMS, and CRM systems and learn each institution's workflows, targeting the $735B universities spend annually on administrative labor.
highlight.zh: Risely 的代理整合大學的 SIS、LMS 與 CRM 系統並學習各校工作流程,瞄準大學每年 7,350 億美元的行政人力支出。

summary.en: A low-latency AI engine for mobile devices and wearables.
summary.zh: 為行動裝置與穿戴裝置打造的低延遲 AI 引擎。

highlight.en: Cactus builds a low-latency AI inference engine for mobile devices and wearables, developed in the open on GitHub.
highlight.zh: Cactus 為行動裝置與穿戴裝置打造低延遲 AI 推論引擎,並在 GitHub 上公開開發。

summary.en: Book any truckload in 10 minutes.
summary.zh: 在 10 分鐘內訂下任何貨運運單。

highlight.en: With over a million US loads still booked via calls and emails, Lanesurf's AI agents find nearby empty trucks, contact them in parallel, negotiate rates, and book the best one.
highlight.zh: 在全美每日逾百萬筆運單仍靠電話與電郵成交之際,Lanesurf 的 AI 代理找出附近空車、同時聯繫、議價並訂下最佳車輛。

summary.en: Replacing the restaurant phone line with voice AI.
summary.zh: 以語音 AI 取代餐廳電話線。

highlight.en: Certus answers every restaurant call 24/7 in multiple languages to take orders, book reservations, and upsell, integrating with systems like Toast, Square, UberEats, and DoorDash.
highlight.zh: Certus 以多語言全天候接聽每通餐廳來電,點餐、訂位並加售,並整合 Toast、Square、UberEats 與 DoorDash 等系統。

summary.en: Helping products get discovered and used by AI agents.
summary.zh: 幫助產品被 AI 代理發現並使用。

highlight.en: The Prompting Company analyzes whether your product shows up in customers' AI queries and tests whether AI agents can actually find your docs and complete tasks with your product.
highlight.zh: The Prompting Company 分析你的產品是否出現在客戶的 AI 查詢中,並測試 AI 代理能否真正找到你的文件並用你的產品完成任務。

summary.en: AI accounting for enterprise finance teams.
summary.zh: 為企業財務團隊打造的 AI 會計。

highlight.en: Finto automates the invoice-to-pay process from email inbox to ERP, cutting out 80% of accountants' daily work in invoice recording, coding, and approvals.
highlight.zh: Finto 自動化從電子郵件收件匣到 ERP 的「發票到付款」流程,省去會計人員在發票登錄、編碼與審批上 80% 的日常工作。

summary.en: Production visibility for teams that ship fast.
summary.zh: 為快速交付團隊打造的生產環境可視性。

highlight.en: Interfere detects, triages, and fixes bugs automatically with no human required, owning resolution from first signal to production.
highlight.zh: Interfere 在無需人力介入下自動偵測、分流並修復錯誤,從第一個訊號到上線都全程負責解決。

summary.en: An in-real-life friendship app for women.
summary.zh: 為女性打造的線下交友應用程式。

highlight.en: Made for women by women, RealRoots asks a few questions and matches users into in-person hangs with women they'll actually click with.
highlight.zh: RealRoots 由女性為女性打造,透過幾道問題將使用者配對成線下聚會,結識真正合得來的女性。

summary.en: Enterprise voice agents with cloud and on-prem options.
summary.zh: 提供雲端與地端選項的企業級語音代理。

highlight.en: Acrely lets enterprises build and deploy enterprise-grade voice agents for customer service, sales, and operations, with both cloud and on-prem offerings.
highlight.zh: Acrely 讓企業建構並部署用於客服、銷售與營運的企業級語音代理,並同時提供雲端與地端方案。

summary.en: Automatically blocking risky AI behavior with real-time governance agents.
summary.zh: 以即時治理代理自動封鎖高風險的 AI 行為。

highlight.en: Truth Systems translates operational policies into real-time guardrails that monitor every AI interaction and proactively block non-compliant actions across the enterprise.
highlight.zh: Truth Systems 將營運政策轉為即時護欄,監控每一次 AI 互動,並在企業內主動封鎖不合規的行為。

summary.en: RNA intelligence for precision medicine.
summary.zh: 為精準醫療打造的 RNA 智慧。

highlight.en: Blank Bio trains RNA foundation models that learn the patterns shaping disease progression and treatment response, aiming to raise clinical-trial success rates.
highlight.zh: Blank Bio 訓練 RNA 基礎模型,學習形塑疾病進程與治療反應的模式,目標是提高臨床試驗的成功率。

summary.en: AI models that teach robot arms new skills in hours.
summary.zh: 讓機械手臂在數小時內學會新技能的 AI 模型。

highlight.en: Verne's AI models let robot arms learn new skills in hours, automating back-of-house tasks under a pay-by-the-hour model, with customers including a biotech unicorn.
highlight.zh: Verne 的 AI 模型讓機械手臂在數小時內學會新技能,以按時計費模式自動化後場工作,客戶包括一家生技獨角獸。

summary.en: AI that makes AI fast.
summary.zh: 讓 AI 變快的 AI。

highlight.en: Wafer builds AI agents that act as autonomous performance engineers, optimizing GPU kernels to deliver serverless, dedicated inference for the world's fastest open-source LLMs.
highlight.zh: Wafer 打造扮演自主效能工程師的 AI 代理,最佳化 GPU 核心,為世界最快的開源 LLM 提供無伺服器的專屬推論。

summary.en: AI agents for firmware development.
summary.zh: 用於韌體開發的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Embedder is building an AI coding agent that can write, test, and debug firmware on real hardware.
highlight.zh: Embedder 正打造能在真實硬體上撰寫、測試與除錯韌體的 AI 編碼代理。

summary.en: The AI explainer video maker.
summary.zh: AI 解說影片製作工具。

highlight.en: Upload any document or deck and Knowlify produces a professional animated explainer video in minutes, with no designers, animators, or editors needed.
highlight.zh: 上傳任何文件或簡報,Knowlify 在幾分鐘內產出專業的動畫解說影片,無需設計師、動畫師或剪輯師。

summary.en: An AI-native BPO for travel and transport.
summary.zh: 為旅遊與運輸業打造的 AI 原生 BPO。

highlight.en: Humoniq builds the first AI-native BPO for travel and transport, an industry outsourcing $20B in support yearly; its team previously grew Flightfox to $22M/yr.
highlight.zh: Humoniq 為每年外包 200 億美元客服的旅遊與運輸業打造首個 AI 原生 BPO;團隊先前曾將 Flightfox 成長至年營收 2,200 萬美元。

summary.en: Crazy fast, open-source infrastructure for AI agents to use the internet.
summary.zh: 讓 AI 代理使用網際網路的極速開源基礎設施。

highlight.en: Built on unikernels for sub-150ms cold starts, Kernel offers managed headful browsers with stealth mode, residential proxies, and CAPTCHA solving, trusted by Cash App and 1000+ others.
highlight.zh: Kernel 建構於 unikernel 之上,冷啟動低於 150 毫秒,提供具隱身模式、住宅代理與 CAPTCHA 破解的代管有頭瀏覽器,獲 Cash App 等逾千家客戶採用。

summary.en: The global dollar app for Brazil.
summary.zh: 為巴西打造的全球美元應用程式。

highlight.en: Ruvo connects Pix, crypto, and Visa so Brazilians can receive USD from abroad, convert between USD and BRL in minutes, spend worldwide, and save in yield-bearing digital dollars.
highlight.zh: Ruvo 串接 Pix、加密貨幣與 Visa,讓巴西人收取海外美元、數分鐘內在美元與巴西雷亞爾間兌換、全球消費,並以具收益的數位美元儲蓄。

summary.en: A USB-C dongle and iPhone app that runs your phone when you just ask.
summary.zh: 一個 USB-C 隨身碟與 iPhone 應用程式,只要開口就能替你操作手機。

highlight.en: Plug in Blue and say what needs doing; it opens the right app and completes follow-ups, bookings, and replies across every app on your iPhone without you touching it.
highlight.zh: 插上 Blue 並說出要做的事,它便開啟正確的應用程式,在你 iPhone 上的每個 app 中完成跟進、預約與回覆,全程不需你動手。

summary.en: An AI platform that makes social marketing as easy as running a Google search.
summary.zh: 讓社群行銷如同進行 Google 搜尋般簡單的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Stormy automates influencer marketing end to end, with AI that pinpoints ideal influencers, auto-sends personalized outreach, and negotiates and finalizes deals.
highlight.zh: Stormy 端對端自動化網紅行銷,AI 精準鎖定理想網紅、自動寄送個人化接觸訊息,並協商與敲定合作。

summary.en: Data and RL environments to automate knowledge work.
summary.zh: 用以自動化知識工作的資料與強化學習環境。

highlight.en: Halluminate helps model labs and enterprises train computer-use AI with proprietary benchmark datasets and realistic sandbox environments, such as a simulated Salesforce.
highlight.zh: Halluminate 以專有的基準資料集與擬真沙盒環境(如模擬版 Salesforce),協助模型實驗室與企業訓練電腦操作 AI。

summary.en: An AI investment advisor for retail investors.
summary.zh: 為散戶投資人打造的 AI 投資顧問。

highlight.en: Founded by alumni of Nubank, Stripe, and Robinhood, Astor gives active investors AI agents that uncover opportunities, decode trends, and deliver tailored analysis around the clock.
highlight.zh: Astor 由 Nubank、Stripe 與 Robinhood 的前員工創立,為活躍投資人提供全天候挖掘機會、解讀趨勢並提供量身分析的 AI 代理。

summary.en: The end-to-end testing layer for AI-driven development.
summary.zh: 為 AI 驅動開發打造的端對端測試層。

highlight.en: Lark lets teams write end-to-end tests in plain English to validate dashboards, APIs, SDKs, and full product flows without maintaining fragile test code.
highlight.zh: Lark 讓團隊用白話英文撰寫端對端測試,驗證儀表板、API、SDK 與完整產品流程,免去維護脆弱的測試程式碼。

summary.en: Analyze any footage without training a model.
summary.zh: 無需訓練模型即可分析任何影像。

highlight.en: OnDeck's Vision Language Model engine lets organizations instantly find any object, behavior, or event in any footage without training data, with methods that beat traditional CV in a NeurIPS paper.
highlight.zh: OnDeck 的視覺語言模型引擎讓組織無需訓練資料即可在任何影像中即時找出任何物件、行為或事件,其方法在 NeurIPS 論文中勝過傳統電腦視覺。

summary.en: A database of every product on the internet.
summary.zh: 網路上每件商品的資料庫。

highlight.en: Channel3 gives developers access to a product graph like those Google and OpenAI keep private, using image classification and reasoning models to match products across merchants.
highlight.zh: Channel3 讓開發者得以使用如 Google 與 OpenAI 私藏的商品圖譜,並以影像分類與推理模型跨商家比對商品。

summary.en: AI-powered social engineering defense.
summary.zh: AI 驅動的社交工程防禦。

highlight.en: GhostEye runs an autonomous security loop on your employee attack surface, tracking attackers' current tactics, safely testing for exposure, and closing gaps before a breach.
highlight.zh: GhostEye 在你的員工攻擊面上運行自主安全迴圈,追蹤攻擊者當前手法、安全測試暴露點,並在外洩前堵住漏洞。

summary.en: A product lab solving context in AI.
summary.zh: 專注解決 AI 脈絡問題的產品實驗室。

highlight.en: Nozomio is a product lab focused on solving the problem of context in AI.
highlight.zh: Nozomio 是一個專注於解決 AI 脈絡問題的產品實驗室。

summary.en: The AI data analyst for biology labs.
summary.zh: 為生物實驗室打造的 AI 數據分析師。

highlight.en: Scientists upload experimental data, ask questions in plain English, and get publication-ready plots in minutes; researchers at UCSF, Mount Sinai, and Harvard already use Novaflow.
highlight.zh: 科學家上傳實驗資料、用白話英文提問,即可在數分鐘內取得可供發表的圖表;UCSF、西奈山與哈佛的研究人員已在使用 Novaflow。

summary.en: Cloud infrastructure for MCP servers and Claude / ChatGPT apps.
summary.zh: 為 MCP 伺服器與 Claude／ChatGPT 應用打造的雲端基礎設施。

highlight.en: Built by the team behind the open-source mcp-use SDK (10k stars, 8M+ downloads), Manufact readies products for the Claude Connectors marketplace and ChatGPT App Store.
highlight.zh: Manufact 由開源 mcp-use SDK(1 萬顆星、逾 800 萬次下載)的團隊打造,協助產品上架 Claude Connectors 市集與 ChatGPT App Store。

summary.en: Voice AI agents for debt collection.
summary.zh: 用於催收的語音 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Altur builds voice AI agents for debt collection.
highlight.zh: Altur 打造用於債務催收的語音 AI 代理。

summary.en: A GD&T analysis platform for engineering drawings.
summary.zh: 為工程圖面打造的 GD&T 分析平台。

highlight.en: F4 analyzes a drawing and 3D file to assess whether a design is clear, manufacturable, and production-ready, visualizing datums and tolerance zones and computing stack-ups instantly.
highlight.zh: F4 分析圖面與 3D 檔案,評估設計是否清晰、可製造且可投產,並即時視覺化基準與公差區並計算公差堆疊。

summary.en: Reliable web agents for the enterprise.
summary.zh: 為企業打造的可靠網頁代理。

highlight.en: Notte provides enterprise-grade browser agents, tools, and infrastructure through a single API, offering the fastest path to reliable web AI agents in production.
highlight.zh: Notte 透過單一 API 提供企業級瀏覽器代理、工具與基礎設施,是將可靠網頁 AI 代理推上生產環境的最快途徑。
